name: pet-cursor
description: Animated cursor pets that walk, run, jump, and fly while you type.

catCursor.symbol.description: Fallback symbol used if GIFs cannot be loaded.

catCursor.petType.description: Pet type used by the cursor overlay. Birds (cockatiel/chicken) use fly motion on line changes.

catCursor.leftOffset.description: Horizontal offset for cat placement. Positive moves cat to the right.

catCursor.verticalOffset.description: Top offset for line alignment. Negative moves cat up onto the text line.

catCursor.enabled.description: Enable cat cursor automatically on startup.

catCursor.minimizeNativeCursor.description: Use a very thin native cursor so the cat overlay feels like the primary cursor.

catCursor.disableNativeBlinking.description: Force native cursor to solid (non-blinking) while extension is enabled.

catCursor.hideNativeCursorColor.description: Attempt to hide native cursor by setting editor cursor color transparent.

catCursor.sitGifPath.description: Path to GIF shown when idle. Relative paths are resolved from the extension folder.

catCursor.wakeUpGifPath.description: Path to GIF shown briefly when typing starts (standing up).

catCursor.standRightGifPath.description: Path to standing GIF facing right while waiting for input.

catCursor.standLeftGifPath.description: Path to standing GIF facing left while looking around.

catCursor.jumpUpGifPath.description: Path to jump-up GIF shown when cursor moves to a higher line.

catCursor.jumpDownGifPath.description: Path to jump-down GIF shown when cursor moves to a lower line.

catCursor.flyUpGifPath.description: Path to fly-up GIF used by flying pets when cursor moves to a higher line.

catCursor.flyDownGifPath.description: Path to fly-down GIF used by flying pets when cursor moves to a lower line.

catCursor.walkGifPath.description: Legacy/compat path for right-facing walk GIF.

catCursor.walkLookBackGifPath.description: Path to forward-moving walk GIF where only the face looks backward.

catCursor.runGifPath.description: Legacy/compat path for right-facing run GIF.

catCursor.runLookBackGifPath.description: Path to forward-moving run GIF where only the face looks backward.

catCursor.deleteGifPath.description: Legacy/compat path for left-facing backspace walk GIF.

catCursor.backspaceLeftGifPath.description: Path to left-facing walking GIF used during backspace.

catCursor.spriteWidthEm.description: Displayed GIF width in em units.

catCursor.spriteHeightEm.description: Displayed GIF height in em units.

catCursor.fitToLineHeight.description: Scale cat height to match the editor line height.

catCursor.spriteAspectRatio.description: Width/height ratio used when fitting sprite to line height.

catCursor.idleDelayMs.description: Milliseconds after typing stops before cat sits.

catCursor.runThresholdCps.description: Typing speed in chars/sec above which cat runs.

catCursor.runWordThreshold.description: Number of completed words typed in a burst before cat switches to run.

catCursor.activeTypingWindowMs.description: Milliseconds after last keypress considered part of active typing.

catCursor.wakeUpDurationMs.description: Milliseconds for stand-up animation when typing starts.

catCursor.idleStandMs.description: Idle wait duration where cat stands and watches the user.

catCursor.idlePatrolMs.description: Idle duration spent walking left/right to attract attention before sitting.

catCursor.patrolStepsPerSide.description: How many walk steps the cat takes in one direction before turning during idle patrol.

catCursor.idleWanderCh.description: Horizontal distance (in ch) the cat roams away from cursor during idle patrol.

catCursor.standLookFlipMs.description: Milliseconds between left/right standing look changes.

catCursor.stateRefreshIntervalMs.description: How often the extension checks if the cat should switch state.

catCursor.deleteTurnMs.description: Milliseconds to keep the left-facing backspace look animation after deletion.

catCursor.backspaceRunHoldMs.description: How long backspace must be held before delete animation can switch from walk to run.

catCursor.backspaceRunThresholdCps.description: Delete speed (chars/sec) needed to trigger backspace run once hold time is met.

catCursor.navigationMoveMs.description: Milliseconds to show left/right walk motion after keyboard cursor movement.

catCursor.navigationFaceMs.description: Milliseconds to keep cat facing navigation direction after cursor movement.

catCursor.jumpBaseMs.description: Base jump animation duration when moving across lines.

catCursor.jumpPerLineMs.description: Extra jump duration added per line crossed.

catCursor.jumpMaxMs.description: Maximum jump duration cap for long line-distance jumps.

catCursor.showBlinkCaret.description: Show a blinking caret marker at the exact cursor position while cat overlay is active.

catCursor.blinkCaretIntervalMs.description: Blink interval in milliseconds for the caret marker.

catCursor.blinkCaretSymbol.description: Character used for the blinking caret marker.

catCursor.blinkCaretVerticalOffset.description: Vertical margin offset for the blinking caret marker.
